opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is pounding out of my skull, my heart is beating so hard my chest shakes, and I feel like I am going to die right now.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly a few hours ago — a severe throbbing headache, pounding heart and drenching sweats, and a home blood pressure reading that was frighteningly high.

symptom_narrative.duration: three hours and ongoing during this attack
symptom_narrative.character: severe throbbing/pounding headache with a racing, pounding heart, drenching sweats and shaking
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst he has felt — feels like he is going to die, overwhelming panic and dread
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: head is pounding, heart pounding in the chest, sweating all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in sudden episodes; this one is the most severe
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: the previous episodes settled on their own after a while
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing he can identify — it came on out of the blue
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profuse sweating, palpitations, tremor/shaking, a feeling of impending doom and panic; spouse says he looks very pale during the attack
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: three similar but milder attacks over the last two months, each of which settled by itself
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: pacing the room, highly agitated, unable to settle because of the headache and panic

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: unintentional weight loss of about 5 kg recently
feels lightheaded/dizzy when standing up between these attacks

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse is present at home and made the call; denies using decongestants (pseudoephedrine) or any stimulant drugs

objective_data_offered.value: 210/115 mmHg on our home blood pressure cuff during the worst of it
objective_data_offered.timing: at the peak of the current attack
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff taken while very distressed and shaking — may be unreliable

objective_data_offered.value: pale, sweaty and visibly trembling; pacing and very agitated
spouse reports he is drenched in sweat, looks pale and shaky, and keeps saying he feels like something terrible is about to happen
